summary: Iteration 84 - FY Summary with Ledger Parties, Carry Forward API, and Local Party Summary Bar Fix. All backend tests passed (15/15). Frontend verified: FY Summary Dashboard shows all 11 sections including Ledger Parties, Carry Forward button, PDF Export. Local Party summary bar correctly HIDDEN when no party selected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FY Summary Dashboard with all 11 sections (cash_bank, paddy_stock, milling, frk_stock, byproducts, mill_parts, diesel, local_party, staff_advances, private_trading, ledger_parties) fully working. Carry Forward API saves closing balances as next FY opening. Local Party summary bar correctly hides when no party selected.

local_party_summary_bar.description: Summary bar correctly HIDDEN when no party selected. Shows when party is selected.
local_party_summary_bar.implementation: Lines 267-288 in LocalPartyAccount.jsx: {summary && selectedParty && (...)} ensures bar only shows when party selected

fy_summary_api.description: GET /api/fy-summary returns all 11 sections including ledger_parties

fy_summary_ledger_parties.description: ledger_parties section includes total_parties, total_opening, total_jama, total_nikasi, total_closing, and per-party data
fy_summary_ledger_parties.sample_data: 24 parties with Opening: -40000, Jama: 839191.4, Nikasi: 852191.4, Closing: -53000

fy_summary_carry_forward.description: POST /api/fy-summary/carry-forward saves all closing balances as next FY opening
fy_summary_carry_forward.test_verified: 2025-26 closing carried to 2026-27 opening. Cash/Bank/Paddy/FRK/Byproducts/Mill Parts/Diesel/Staff/Ledger Parties all preserved

fy_summary_pdf.description: GET /api/fy-summary/pdf exports PDF with all 11 sections including Ledger Parties (section 10)

components_verified: Ledger Parties (Cashbook) card with per-party table
Private Trading card with Paddy/Rice sections
Carry Forward to Next FY button
